category.scope_note: Hand-held and transportable electric and cordless power tools exported from China to Qatar, compared against the China GB/T 3883 domestic baseline.

title.en: China-to-Qatar Power Tool Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动工具进入卡塔尔：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動工具進入卡塔爾：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China power-tool compliance against Qatar QGOSM conformity, GSO/IEC electrical safety, EMC, noise practice, restricted substances, and cordless-radio requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动工具合规与卡塔尔 QGOSM 符合性、GSO/IEC 电气安全、电磁兼容、噪声实践、限用物质及无绳无线电要求的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動工具合規與卡塔爾 QGOSM 符合性、GSO/IEC 電氣安全、電磁相容、噪聲實務、限用物質及無繩無線電要求的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-body assessment, customs determination, market-access approval, or product-safety design review. Exporters and importers should verify current Qatar QGOSM and GSO requirements, conformity-assessment routes, CRA radio rules, and destination-country enforcement practice with qualified professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、符合性机构评审、海关裁定、市场准入批准或产品安全设计评审。出口商和进口商在出货前应与合格专业人士核验现行卡塔尔 QGOSM 及 GSO 要求、符合性评定路径、CRA 无线电规则及目的国执法实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、符合性機構評審、海關裁定、市場准入批准或產品安全設計評審。出口商和進口商在出貨前應與合格專業人士核驗現行卡塔爾 QGOSM 及 GSO 要求、符合性評定路徑、CRA 無線電規則及目的國執法實務。

answer_first.en: For China-made electric or cordless power tools entering Qatar, the practical baseline is conformity under the Qatar General Organization for Standards and Metrology (QGOSM) using GSO standards that adopt IEC 62841, electrical safety for 240 V / 50 Hz mains, EMC and restricted-substance evidence, and CRA type approval for any cordless tool with a radio. There is no EU-style outdoor-noise product marking in Qatar, so noise is handled as occupational and standards-based, not as a CE-type label.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的有线或无绳电动工具进入卡塔尔，实务基线是通过卡塔尔标准计量总局（QGOSM）采用 GSO 标准（其采纳 IEC 62841）完成符合性、满足 240 V / 50 Hz 市电的电气安全、提供电磁兼容和限用物质证据，并为任何带无线电的无绳工具取得 CRA 型号核准。卡塔尔没有欧盟式的户外噪声产品标识，因此噪声按职业和标准要求处理，而非 CE 式标签。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的有線或無繩電動工具進入卡塔爾，實務基線是透過卡塔爾標準計量總局（QGOSM）採用 GSO 標準（其採納 IEC 62841）完成符合性、滿足 240 V / 50 Hz 市電的電氣安全、提供電磁相容和限用物質證據，並為任何帶無線電的無繩工具取得 CRA 型號核准。卡塔爾沒有歐盟式的戶外噪聲產品標識，因此噪聲按職業和標準要求處理，而非 CE 式標籤。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
